英國英格蘭越可爾包爾-霍爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Holme於大約1482年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾包爾-霍爾姆時，他的父親Robert Holme33歲，母親Margaret Constable32歲。他於1499年與Katherine Hildyard在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1541年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 洛維特享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Holme于大约1482年出生在英国英格兰越可爾包爾-霍爾姆时，他的父亲Robert Holme33岁，母亲Margaret Constable32岁。他于1499年与Katherine Hildyard在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1541年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 洛維特享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Holm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Thor, Holger, Nels, Nils, Sven, Helmer, Lennart, Niels, Vibeke.

English, Scottish, German, and Scandinavian: topographic name for someone who lived on an island, in particular a piece of slightly raised land lying in a fen or partly surrounded by streams, from Middle English, Middle Low German holm, Old Norse holmr, or else a habitational name from a place called with this element. The Swedish name is often ornamental.

English: topographic name for someone who lived where holly grew, from Middle English holm, a divergent development of Old English hole(g)n ‘holly (tree)’; or, especially in southern England, a habitational name from any of the places such as East and West Holme (Dorset) or Holne (Devon). Compare Hollis .

variants.name: Holmes
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Holme was born about 1482, in Paul-Holm, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Holme, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Constable, was 32. He married Katherine Hildyard in 1499, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1541, in Elmley Lovett, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

Il a épousé Katherine Hildyard en 1499, à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1541, à Elmley Lovett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: William Holme(이)가 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 폴-홀름에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Holme(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Constable(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 Katherine Hildyard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 러베트에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Holme родился около 1482 г. в местности поул-холм, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Holme было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Constable, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Hildyard в 1499 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1541 г. в местности элмли лаветт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
